video_info.title: Roland-Garros 2026
video_info.shortDescription: The world's premier clay-court championship returns to Paris, gathering the global elite to battle on the iconic red dirt where victory belongs to the most tenacious. As players push their endurance and tactical artistry to the absolute limit, they compete for ultimate glory and a historic place in Grand Slam history. Tune in to catch all the action from Roland-Garros 2026, LIVE & exclusively on Sony LIV.

video_info.title: UEFA International Friendlies
video_info.shortDescription: Bosnia and Herzegovina take on North Macedonia in an intriguing international friendly as both teams continue to fine-tune their squads and build rhythm ahead of crucial upcoming competitions. Bosnia and Herzegovina will aim to make the most of home conditions with a composed and attacking display, while North Macedonia look to test their tactical discipline and counterattacking threat in what promises to be a competitive encounter. Catch all the action from the International Friendlies, LIVE on Sony LIV.
